title: AN ACT TO AMEND SUBPARAGRAPH (23) FOR THE PROVINCE OF SAMAR, PAGE 465, PARAGRAPH C, TITLE J, SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY HUNDRED AND NINETY-THREE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4209 / 57 OG No. 13, 2290 (March 27, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2892, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND SUBPARAGRAPH (23) FOR THE PROVINCE OF SAMAR, PAGE 465, PARAGRAPH C, TITLE J, SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY HUNDRED AND NINETY-THREE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sum appropriated under item (

j

), subparagraph (23) for the Province of Samar, page 465, paragraph C, Title J, Section two of Republic Act Numbered Twenty hundred and ninety-three is transferred to item (

i

) of the same subparagraph, which is amended to read as follows:

"(

i

) Oras Breakwater, Improvement............P25,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
